case_title: HOWARD LEE VS. BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. ON 09/30/14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:JOSEPH L BERNARDINI) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA JD SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 150.00 - SERVED AUG-23-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA JD SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $775.00 FILED BY LEE, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA JD SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HOWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNARDINI ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA JD SERVICES $775.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $955.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
